title: microseris aliciae
intro: Microseris aliciae, also known as Alicia's brodiaea or golden daisy, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western United States. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Microseris aliciae include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Microseris aliciae can be made by infusing the plant's roots and leaves in water or using it as a topical cream or salve to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
